source_pr.title: http: revert log_level change
source_pr.body: log level is not accessed atomically in this version, cause race issue.

symptoms: log level is not accessed atomically in this version, cause race issue.
failure_signature: log level is not accessed atomically in this version, cause race issue.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a data race on global logging/config state: runtime log_level changes via the HTTP settings handler mutated log level / global config without atomic synchronization. The patch stabilizes it by reverting the log_level endpoint changes to remove the unsafe concurrent mutation path.
fix_pattern: Avoid non-atomic mutation of global config/log state; remove or guard runtime log-level changes to eliminate data races.

evidence: evidence: log level is not accessed atomically in this version, cause race issue.
